title: SERMORELIN
description: Sermorelin is a growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) analog that stimulates natural GH production from the pituitary. It's FDA-approved for GH deficiency in children and used off-label for anti-aging and body composition optimization.

research.title: A potentially effective drug for patients with recurrent glioma
research.summary: Sermorelin could be effective for treating recurrent gliomas by inhibiting tumor cell proliferation and enhancing immune responses.

research.title: Agonists of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) inhibit human experimental cancers
research.summary: GHRH agonists like Sermorelin inhibited tumor growth by regulating the expression of key proteins in cancer cells.

research.title: GHRH and sleep
research.summary: Sermorelin was shown to promote deep, non-REM sleep by stimulating growth hormone release, making it a potential therapeutic target for sleep disorders.

sentiment.summary: Popular choice for those seeking GH benefits through natural production rather than exogenous HGH. Users report improved sleep, recovery, and gradual body composition changes.

effects.label: Gradual Results:
effects.description: Benefits manifest over weeks to months.

effects.label: Synergy:
effects.description: Often combined with GHRP for amplified effects.

sideEffects.label: Generally Well Tolerated:
sideEffects.description: Few side effects at normal doses.
